title: Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism
description: SHOULD / COULD / WOULD + HAVE + past participle comment on completed past actions.
summary_pt_br: Modais perfect: SHOULD HAVE (arrependimento), COULD HAVE (possibilidade), WOULD HAVE (hipotético).

scenes.chapter: Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism
scenes.subtitle_en: SHOULD / COULD / WOULD + HAVE + past participle comment on completed past actions.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Modais perfect: SHOULD HAVE (arrependimento), COULD HAVE (possibilidade), WOULD HAVE (hipotético).

scenes.text_en: SHOULD / COULD / WOULD + HAVE + past participle comment on completed past actions. Today's focus: modal perfect — past regret and criticism. I should have listened to my mentor's advice.
scenes.text_pt: Modais perfect: SHOULD HAVE (arrependimento), COULD HAVE (possibilidade), WOULD HAVE (hipotético). Foco de hoje: modal perfect — past regret and criticism. Eu devia ter escutado o conselho do meu mentor.

scenes.title: Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism
scenes.body_en: SHOULD HAVE = regret/criticism. COULD HAVE = unrealized possibility. WOULD HAVE = hypothetical. MUST HAVE = strong guess. MIGHT HAVE = weak guess. 'I should have listened.'
scenes.body_pt: Modais perfect: SHOULD HAVE (arrependimento), COULD HAVE (possibilidade), WOULD HAVE (hipotético).

examples.en: I should have listened to my mentor's advice.
examples.pt: Eu devia ter escutado o conselho do meu mentor.

examples.en: We could have finished the project yesterday.
examples.pt: Poderíamos ter terminado o projeto ontem.

examples.en: She must have left early because her car is gone.
examples.pt: Ela deve ter saído cedo porque o carro sumiu.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism

exercise.question: Complete: "I should have ___ to my mentor's advice."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I should have listened to my mentor's advice."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Eu devia ter escutado o conselho do meu mentor.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
We could have finished the project yesterday.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "We could have finished the project yesterday."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Poderíamos ter terminado o projeto ontem.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre modal perfect — past regret and criticism. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Joca, how was yesterday's product launch?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We should have tested more before going live.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Did anything actually break during the launch?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, and we could have prevented all of it.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Who gave you the warning you ignored?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My lead engineer must have warned me twice.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What should you have done differently?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I should have delayed by one week.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Can you recover by next month?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: If we had planned better, we would have.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hindsight teaches what foresight never did.

scenes.title: The launch that failed
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe what Joca regrets and what he should have done differently. Use at least three modal perfects.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The Monday after the launch, the team gathered for a retrospective that none of them wanted to attend.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: We should have delayed the launch by at least seven days, in hindsight.

paragraphs.speaker: Engineer
paragraphs.en: I could have been clearer about the risks I flagged in the Friday meeting.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: You must have felt ignored, and I'm sorry I didn't listen properly.

paragraphs.speaker: Engineer
paragraphs.en: If we had tested the edge cases, we would have caught the bug in staging.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The launch had failed — but the retrospective, handled well, turned failure into fuel.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism". SHOULD / COULD / WOULD + HAVE + past participle comment on completed past actions. I should have listened to my mentor's advice. We could have finished the project yesterday. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism
check.explanation: She says: "Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Modal Perfect — Past Regret and Criticism".
